zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg於1074年出生在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫阿斯格時，他的父親Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg34歲，母親Mechtild von Northeim29歲。他於1106年與Beatrix von Hildrizhausen結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1115年2月11日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特曼斯費爾德 藍德維爾福斯爾茲享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg于1074年出生在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫阿斯格时，他的父亲Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg34岁，母亲Mechtild von Northeim29岁。他于1106年与Beatrix von Hildrizhausen结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1115年2月11日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特曼斯費爾德 藍德維爾福斯爾茲享年41岁。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg was born in 1074, in Arnsberg, Westphalia, Prussia, his father, Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg, was 34 and his mother, Mechtild von Northeim, was 29. He married Beatrix von Hildrizhausen in 1106. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 11 February 1115, in Welfesholz, Mansfelder Land, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg est né en 1074, à Arnsberg, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, son père, Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mechtild von Northeim, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix von Hildrizhausen en 1106. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 février 1115, à Welfesholz, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 41 ans.

Er hat 1106 Beatrix von Hildrizhausen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Februar 1115 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Welfesholz, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland.

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg(이)가 1074년 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 아른스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechtild von Northeim(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1106년 Beatrix von Hildrizhausen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1115년 2월 11일 독일 작센-아할트 맨스펠더 랜드 웰페쇼즈에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg nasceu em 1074, em Arnsberg, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, seu pai, Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mechtild von Northeim, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix von Hildrizhausen em 1106. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1115, em Welfesholz, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Heinrich I von Werl-Rietberg родился в 1074 г. в местности арнсбирг, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mechtild von Northeim, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix von Hildrizhausen в 1106 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 11 февраля 1115 г. в местности велфешолз, мансфелдир ланд, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 41 год.
